title: SPC Signal Delay Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the financial impact of delayed detection and response to out-of-control signals in statistical process control (SPC) systems, incorporating lean and six sigma principles.

inputs.label: Process Cycle Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Average time to complete one production cycle. Used to estimate units produced per shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to complete one production cycle. Used to estimate units produced per shift.

inputs.label: Units per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced in one complete cycle.

inputs.label: Defect Rate When Out of Control
inputs.businessContext: Expected defect percentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

label_i18n.en: Defect Rate When Out of Control

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected defect percentage when the process is out of control (based on historical SPC data).

inputs.label: Defect Rate When In Control
inputs.businessContext: Baseline defect percentage when the process is stable and in control.

businessContext_i18n.en: Baseline defect percentage when the process is stable and in control.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred per defective unit (scrap, rework, warranty, etc.).

inputs.label: Detection Delay (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from when the process goes out of control until the signal is detected (e.g., sampling interval, lab delay).

inputs.label: Response Delay (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Time from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from detection until corrective action is implemented (e.g., root cause analysis, adjustment).

inputs.label: Shift Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of production hours per shift. Used to calculate daily production volume.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of production hours per shift. Used to calculate daily production volume.

inputs.label: Shifts per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of shifts operating per day.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of shifts operating per day.

inputs.label: Operating Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the plant operates annually.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days the plant operates annually.

inputs.label: Out-of-Control Signal Frequency (per year)
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of out-of-control signals per year based on historical SPC data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of out-of-control signals per year based on historical SPC data.

inputs.label: Cost of Correction per Event
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to investigate and correct an out-of-control event (labor, materials, downtime).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost to investigate and correct an out-of-control event (labor, materials, downtime).

inputs.label: Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include estimated hidden costs such as brand damage and lost future sales.

label_i18n.en: Include Hidden Losses (e.g., customer dissatisfaction, lost sales)

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include estimated hidden costs such as brand damage and lost future sales.

inputs.label: Hidden Loss Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier applied to direct defect costs to estimate hidden losses (based on industry benchmarks).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier applied to direct defect costs to estimate hidden losses (based on industry benchmarks).

rules.message: Out-of-control defect rate must be greater than in-control defect rate.
Detection and response delays cannot be negative.
Hidden loss multiplier must be at least 1.0 when hidden losses are included.

thresholds.message: Delay cost per event exceeds $10,000. Immediate process improvement recommended.
Out-of-control defect rate exceeds 10%. Review process capability and control limits.
Low signal frequency may indicate insufficient sampling or insensitive control limits.

formulas.label: Units Produced per Hour
formulas.description: Production rate based on cycle time and units per cycle.

formulas.label: Total Delay Hours per Event
formulas.description: Sum of detection and response delays.

formulas.label: Defective Units Produced During Delay
formulas.description: Number of defective units produced while process is out of control and not corrected.

formulas.label: Direct Defect Cost per Event
formulas.description: Cost of defective units produced during the delay period.

formulas.label: Hidden Loss Cost per Event
formulas.description: Estimated hidden costs (customer dissatisfaction, lost sales) if enabled.

formulas.label: Total Delay Cost per Event
formulas.description: Sum of direct defect cost, hidden loss, and correction cost for one event.

formulas.label: Annual Delay Cost
formulas.description: Total annual cost due to delayed SPC signal response.

primary.label: Annual SPC Signal Delay Cost
primary.description: Total estimated annual cost resulting from delayed detection and response to out-of-control SPC signals.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Detection Delay
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Time to detect out-of-control signal. Long delays increase defect volume.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Response Delay
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Time to implement corrective action. Delays prolong defect generation.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Defect Rate Spread
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Difference between out-of-control and in-control defect rates. Larger spread increases cost.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Production Rate
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Higher production rates amplify the number of defects during delays.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Detection Delay
suggestedActions.description: Implement real-time SPC monitoring or reduce sampling intervals to detect signals faster.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces defective units during delay by up to 50%.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Response Time
suggestedActions.description: Establish clear escalation protocols and pre-defined corrective action plans (CAPA).

suggestedActions.label: Enhance Process Capability
suggestedActions.description: Use Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce baseline defect rate and tighten control limits.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Lowers defect rate spread and overall cost.

suggestedActions.label: Automate Correction
suggestedActions.description: Deploy automated feedback loops (e.g., APC) to adjust process parameters without manual intervention.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Eliminates response delay for common-cause variations.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Annual Cost
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Annual delay cost adjusted for data confidence (e.g., based on input variability or historical accuracy). Default multiplier = 0.85 for conservative estimate.
